name: Collection Load
description: Full lifecycle when a collection is selected and loaded as an overworld map

scenarios.description: Collection loaded and displayed as overworld map (layout computed on first load, skipped on return visits)

events.collection-map.convert-nodes: Converted {{memberships.count}} memberships ({{repositories.count}} repositories) to {{nodes.created}} nodes for collection {{collection.id}}
events.collection-map.validate-nodes: Validated {{nodes.total}} nodes: {{nodes.valid}} valid, {{nodes.unplaced}} unplaced (is.initial.load={{is.initial.load}}) for collection {{collection.id}}
events.collection-map.initialize-layout: Computed layout for {{nodes.count}} nodes (needs.regions={{needs.regions}}, needs.layout={{needs.layout}}): {{regions.computed}} regions, {{nodes.positioned}} positioned for collection {{collection.id}}
events.collection-map.batch-save: Saved {{regions.saved}} regions, {{assignments.saved}} assignments, {{positions.saved}} positions for collection {{collection.id}}
events.collection-map.map-rendered: Rendered map with {{nodes.rendered}} nodes in {{regions.rendered}} regions ({{unplaced.count}} unplaced) for collection {{collection.id}}
